content_body: Blue Ridge Boat Rentals offers a variety of boats to rent for fun on Lake Blue Ridge with various price ranges. Spend a fun day on the lake with your friends and family on a pontoon boat or deck boat. If fishing is what you're after, they have them! They even have jet skis, water skis, knee boards, wakeboards, and tubes of various sizes to rent as well. So, grab your crew and spend a memorable day on beautiful Lake Blue Ridge. These awesome guys will put your boat in the water and pick you up - no stress waiting in line at the boat ramp, no hassle in securing your boat on the trailer - Blue Ridge Boat Rentals makes everything easy for you to enjoy your lake experience. Boating on Lake Blue Ridge is an experience not to be missed!
title: Blue Ridge Boat Rentals
